name: projects
description: Full project lifecycle management — create projects with structured briefs, track ideas from private exploration to actionable artifacts, manage action items with dependency chains, record decisions, monitor comms channels, and generate status reports for stakeholders.
author: agent-index

triggers.description: Start a new project with a structured brief
Initialize a new project workspace
Create a named project from scratch
Modify project settings, members, or milestones
Update a project's milestone schedule
Add a team member to a project
Change project configuration
Archive a completed or inactive project
Mark a project as complete and archive it
Capture a new idea for a project
Log an idea associated with a project
Record an improvement idea
Log progress or status changes on a project
Record completed work on a project
Record what was accomplished on a project
View and manage your assigned action items
Show tasks assigned to you across projects
List open action items
Show all your pending action items
View the decision log for a project
Review recorded decisions on a project
Log a project decision with rationale
Capture a decision that was just made
Get a digest of a project's comms channel
Summarize recent channel activity for a project
Generate a digest of channel messages
Generate a project status report
Get the current status of a project
Quick health check on a project
Generate a stakeholder-ready status report
Get a guided tour of the projects collection
Learn how to use project management features

external_dependencies.access_required: Channel creation, archival, member invitation, message history reading (only if comms channel integration and/or channel monitoring are enabled during collection setup)
